name: Scapia
benefit_user: Get ₹250 cashback after your first successful transaction.
benefit_owner: Earn ₹250 cashback when your friend makes their first transaction.
bonus_amount: You'll get ₹1,000 off your first flight
pros: Zero Forex Markup on all international transactions, saving you significant money abroad.
No annual or joining fees, making it a cost-effective travel companion.
Earn 10% Scapia Coins on flight and hotel bookings made through the Scapia app.
Complimentary domestic lounge access (conditions apply), enhancing your travel experience.
Seamless, app-based application and management for convenience.
cons: Rewards are maximized primarily on travel bookings made via the Scapia platform.
Initial credit limits might be conservative for some new applicants.
Customer support is predominantly digital, which might not suit those who prefer phone banking.
steps: Click on the referral link: https://apply.scapia.cards/landing_page?referral_code=gw2mcr to initiate your application.
Download the Scapia app from your respective app store (Google Play or Apple App Store).
Begin the application process within the app, providing your personal details as requested.
During the application, ensure you enter the referral code gw2mcr in the designated field. This is critical for activating your bonus.
Complete your Know Your Customer (KYC) verification, which typically involves Aadhar and PAN details.
Once your application is approved, your virtual Scapia card will be issued instantly, and a physical card will be dispatched.
Make your first successful transaction using your new Scapia card to qualify for the ₹250 cashback.

faq.question: What is the Scapia credit card?
faq.answer: The Scapia credit card, issued by Federal Bank, is a travel-focused credit card known for its zero foreign exchange markup on international transactions, no annual fees, and strong rewards on travel bookings made through its app.

faq.question: Are there any annual or joining fees for the Scapia card?
faq.answer: No, the Scapia credit card comes with absolutely no joining fees and no annual fees, making it a highly cost-effective option for travelers.

faq.question: How do I earn the referral bonus?
faq.answer: To earn your ₹250 cashback bonus, you must apply using the provided referral code gw2mcr and then complete your very first transaction with your new Scapia card after it has been approved and issued.

faq.question: What is the foreign exchange markup on Scapia card transactions?
faq.answer: The Scapia card offers a significant benefit of zero foreign exchange (forex) markup. This means you pay the exact interbank exchange rate without any additional percentage fees when using the card for international transactions.

detailed_review:
Scapia Card: Your Passport to Smarter Travel Spending

For anyone who finds themselves frequently crossing borders, or even just planning their next domestic getaway, the Scapia credit card, issued in partnership with Federal Bank, presents a compelling proposition. It’s designed from the ground up to simplify travel finances, particularly by tackling one of the most annoying hidden costs: foreign exchange markup fees.

At its core, Scapia is a no-annual-fee credit card built for the modern traveler. Its standout feature is undeniably the zero foreign exchange markup. This means when you use your Scapia card for international transactions, whether it's swiping at a Parisian cafe or booking a hotel in Tokyo, you pay the exact interbank exchange rate without any hidden percentage added by the card issuer. This alone can translate into substantial savings over traditional credit cards that often charge 2-3.5% as a forex markup.

Who is the Scapia Card Perfect For?

  • Frequent International Travelers: If you travel abroad even once a year, the zero forex markup will be a game-changer for your budget.
  • Digital-First Users: The entire application process, card management, and rewards redemption are handled through a sleek, intuitive mobile app.
  • Budget-Conscious Explorers: With no joining fee and no annual fee, it’s a low-commitment option that delivers high value for travel.
  • Those seeking Travel Rewards: While it’s a decent card for general spending, its rewards truly shine on travel bookings.

Features and Benefits That Matter

Beyond the zero forex, Scapia offers a robust rewards program. You earn 10% in Scapia Coins on all flight and hotel bookings made directly through the Scapia app. For all other spending, you still earn a respectable 2% in Scapia Coins. These coins can then be redeemed against future travel bookings on the Scapia platform, creating a neat ecosystem for travel enthusiasts.

Another welcome perk is complimentary domestic lounge access. While not unlimited, meeting specific spend criteria can grant you access to various lounges across Indian airports, offering a moment of calm before your journey. The card also leverages the robust security and acceptance of the Visa network.

Understanding Fees and Charges

As mentioned, there are no joining fees and no annual fees, which is a significant advantage. The zero forex markup is a core benefit, not a promotional offer. Standard credit card charges, however, do apply if you don't pay your bills on time, including interest on outstanding balances and late payment fees. It's crucial to treat it like any other credit card: pay your dues in full and on time to avoid interest charges and maintain a healthy credit score.

Maximizing Your Scapia Experience and Referral Bonus

To get the most out of your Scapia card, prioritize using it for all your international expenditures. When planning flights or hotels, always check the Scapia app first to leverage the higher 10% rewards rate. For the referral bonus, ensure you complete your first transaction promptly after card approval. This could be any purchase, big or small, to trigger the ₹250 cashback.

While the Scapia card excels in its travel-centric features, it's worth noting that its general spending rewards (2%) might not be the absolute highest compared to some cashback-focused cards for everyday use. However, for its specific niche – hassle-free, rewarding international and domestic travel – Scapia makes a very strong case for a spot in your wallet.
